name: trans-korean-codex
description: Codex plugin for trans-korean, a Korean AI-tell reduction and meaning-preserving rewriting workflow.

interface.shortDescription: Reduce mechanical Korean AI tells while preserving meaning.
interface.longDescription: A Codex-first Korean writing skill that reduces GPT-like phrasing, translationese, formulaic structure, and over-polished AI tells with span-grounded local edits.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the humanize-korean skill to reduce mechanical Korean AI tells from this text while preserving meaning.
